category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Hadoop-based data summarization, query, and analysis; official Apache Hive site describes a distributed data warehouse for analytics at massive scale.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is hive.apache.org; official Apache Hive site and repository use the Apache Hive name.
docs_sources: Official Apache Hive site provides a dedicated latest documentation section and getting started guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official Apache Hive site links to GitHub, and the official apache/hive repository identifies itself as Apache Hive.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Hadoop query and analysis; official Apache Hive README describes SQL access, Hadoop, data warehousing, reporting, and large datasets.
